content: I will rewrite `OrdersManagerPage.jsx` to integrate the complete devotee personalized Puja video recording feature. This includes importing the Lucide icons (`Video`, `Trash2`), adding the `uploadingVideo` loading state, coding the R2 file upload and Supabase database binding transaction handlers (`handleVideoUpload`, `handleRemoveVideo`), and constructing a beautifully responsive video player / drag-and-drop dashboard container right under the devotee's Vedic Sankalp card.

args.Description: "Rewrote OrdersManagerPage.jsx to add video file uploading to Cloudflare R2, dynamic Supabase updates for puja_booking_details.puja_video_url, and inline previews/removals in the Details Modal."
